title: Audit Log Capture (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Audit Log Capture" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Audit Log Capture

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Audit Log Capture is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Audit Log Capture
business.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Audit Log Capture" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Audit Log Capture attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Audit Log Capture attempted by a role without permission
Audit Log Capture attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Audit Log Capture succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Audit Log Capture is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Audit Log Capture.
permissionTests: Audit Log Capture is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Audit Log Capture -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-09 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Audit Log Capture changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Audit Log Capture succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Audit Log Capture rejected with invalid data
Access: Audit Log Capture rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
